zh.Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Englan: 英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓
zh.Farnborough, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾法爾波洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth de Grene於大約1422年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾頓時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton23歲，母親Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley30歲。她於1438年與Sir Edward Raleigh Knight在英國瓦維其可爾法爾波洛結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1460年在英國瓦維其可爾法爾波洛享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾。

zh-hans.Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Englan: 英国諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓
zh-hans.Farnborough, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾法爾波洛
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth de Grene于大约1422年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾諾頓时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton23岁，母亲Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley30岁。她于1438年与Sir Edward Raleigh Knight在英国瓦維其可爾法爾波洛结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1460年在英国瓦維其可爾法爾波洛享年39岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth de Grene was born about 1422, in Norton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton, was 23 and her mother, Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley, was 30. She married Sir Edward Raleigh Knight in 1438, in Farnborough, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1460, in Farnborough, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth de Grene est née environ 1422, à Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edward Raleigh Knight en 1438, à Farnborough, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1460, à Farnborough, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth de Grene um 1422 in Norton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton 23 und ihre Mutter Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley 30. Sie hat 1438 in Farnborough, Warwickshire, England Sir Edward Raleigh Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1460 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Farnborough, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth de Grene è nata il circa 1422 nel Norton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edward Raleigh Knight nel 1438, nel Farnborough, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1460, nel Farnborough, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Englan: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグリーネ'ス ノートン
ja.Farnborough, Warwickshire, England: イギリスワーウィクシュアイアファルンボロウ
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth de Greneが約1422年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノートンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Nortonは23歳，母Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartleyは30歳であった。1438年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアファルンボロウでSir Edward Raleigh Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1460年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアファルンボロウで39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth de Grene(이)가 대략 1422년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1438년 영국 워윅실르 패른버루에서 Sir Edward Raleigh Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 워윅실르 패른버루에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth de Grene nasceu aproximadamente 1422, em Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edward Raleigh Knight em 1438, em Farnborough, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1460, em Farnborough, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth de Grene родилась около 1422 г. в местности нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edward Raleigh Knight в 1438 г. в местности фарнбороую, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1460 г. в местности фарнбороую, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.WFT Est 1440-1529: mai le e tusa o le 1440 e o'o I le 1529

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth de Grene nació aproximadamente 1422, en Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir Edward Raleigh Knight en 1438, en Farnborough, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1460, en Farnborough, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
